creator: Trond.Endrestol@ximalas.info
text:
(In reply to Adam Weinberger from comment #5)
> I suspect this was related to the issues referred to in entries on 20141127
> in /usr/ports/UPDATING. It works for me in my jails.
> 
> Can you make sure your tree is up-to-date, and follow the instructions in
> 20141127 if necessary, and let me know if you still encounter this problem?
> 
> I'm really hoping that it's no longer an issue.

Success!

I did a svn revert -R /usr/ports and subsequently a portupgrade -fprv lang/perl5.20. All 123 ports depending on lang/perl5.20, including lang/perl5.20 itself, were successfully and forcefully recompiled and reinstalled.

Well done! Case solved!
